title: GitDiff
description: git.diff — returns a unified diff for the given path (or the whole repository if omitted). The diff is returned as a plain string so the frontend can render it with a diff viewer or feed it to Monaco.

path.description: Optional path to diff. If omitted, diffs the entire working tree.

staged.description: If true, show the staged diff (index vs HEAD) instead of working tree vs index.

path.description: The path that was diffed (echoed back).
